arts.ttl: Newcastle United vs Forest TV channel, live stream, early kick off time
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest head to St James' Park riding high in the Premier League table, but United have already beaten them twice this season - albeit once on penalties - and know the size of their task today, especially after the bruising 4-0 defeat to Manchester City. It's one of two Premier League games today, with Manchester vs Liverpool at 4.30pm.

arts.ttl: 'Quote me', Newcastle United exit left me heartbroken but ignorant pundits will never get it
arts.sum: As Elliot, who did an amazing job at Gateshead after winning the FA Trophy and leading the Tynesiders to the National League play-off spot, attempts to steer Crawley Town to third flight safety he is digging deep into his experiences at Newcastle. We are trying to play good football with young and inexperienced players a bit like we did at Gateshead .

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Nottingham Forest Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Two sides looking to get back to winning ways meet at St James’ Park on Sunday, when Newcastle host Nottingham Forest. Ahead of the match, we’ve made our score prediction, provided our pr...

arts.ttl: Premier League issue Newcastle United VAR statement to clarify big decision with Arsenal example
arts.sum: A statement on their website read: "During Newcastle United's match with Bournemouth in Match Round 22, Sandro Tonali attempted a clearance to save his side from facing a corner, but it was intercepted on the edge of the box by Ryan Christie, and during the same attacking possession phase (APP), Dango Ouattara scored. Dango Ouattara thought he had scored in the second half but replays showed that the ball had actually gone out of play, despite Sandro Tonali's best attempts, before he scored.

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Nottingham Forest: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest travel to Newcastle in the Premier League. Preview includes team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: Nuno Espirito Santo tips Nottingham Forest star for first England call-up
arts.sum: Elliot Anderson returns to Newcastle on Sunday and Nottingham Forest manager Nuno Espirito Santo believes the ex-Magpies midfielder should be in Thomas Tuchel's thoughts

arts.ttl: The Newcastle United man who hasn't started a Premier League clash in 1,165 days
arts.sum: It's now clear that Lewis' spell with the Brazilian side has come to an end after being named in Howe's 25-man Premier League squad. He'd find it tough to break back into Howe's starting XI from thereon out and was left out of the Premier League squad after January 2022 for the remainder of the season.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United could be offered the chance to sign out of favour Man City star
arts.sum: Newcastle United are looking to strengthen their squad in the summer transfer window. The Magpies have performed well this season but there are gaps in their squad that need to be filled at the end of the season.
